retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the refcount operations are part of device lifecycle management, not the primary purpose.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is USB Bluetooth device probing: memory allocation, anchor initialization, HCI device allocation and setup, callback assignment, and registration. The refcount operations (hci_alloc_dev, hci_free_dev) are incidental steps in broader driver initialization logic, not the core focus.
